sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khazih galkapte’n ah, galsim ding kuan un;
Eite mai a masa, Jesuh mitsuan un;
En un a dialpaina, galphual lam

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh’ galkapte’n ah, galkap ding kuan un;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh min a zak ciang, dawi mite tai uh;
Phatna aw kizak ciang, dawi gam kiliing hi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Galkap honpi bangin, Pawlpi’n masot hi;
Eite kikhen lo-in, pum khat bek i hi;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kumpi za sia thei hi, Kumpi gam kip kei;
Dawi in Pasian’ Pawlpi, Cikmah’n zo ngei kei;
ciamsa hi, A ciampeel ngei kei.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Tua hi a hong pawm un, mi khempeuh in-ah;
hong sa khawm un, galzawh nuamna la;
A minthang pahtawi un, leitung vantung ah;
